MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT NISSAN NORTH AMERICA, INC.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. The court orders plaintiff's counsel to meet and confer in compliance with CCP 439 by April 22, 2024. Failure to do so may result in sanctions.
